blocks.value:
flowchart LR
  C[client/] --> A[server routes]
  A --> D[domain/services]
  D --> S[(schema/storage)]
  A --> T[test/*.test.cjs]
  D --> T
  T --> O[docs/advanced portal]
  O --> CI[Pages/release gates]

flowchart LR
  R[Reproduce] --> F[Failing test]
  F --> X[Root-cause fix]
  X --> U[Unit/integration/API]
  U --> D[Docs/migration/changelog]
  D --> Q[All gates]
  Q --> P[PR/release evidence]

flowchart TB
  U[Unit] --> I[Integration/API]
  I --> E[E2E/installed smoke]
  U --> S[Syntax/lint/type]
  I --> B[Production build]
  E --> R[Release consistency/signing]
  S --> R
  B --> R

flowchart LR
  S[Scoped issue] --> B[Branch]
  B --> T[Tests first]
  T --> I[Implementation]
  I --> D[Docs/security review]
  D --> C[Checks]
  C --> R[Review/merge]
